title: lastrea singalanensis
intro: Lastrea singalanensis, also known as Singalan fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The Singalan fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the Singalan fern can be used as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
